summary: Frontend-only verification of (1) new tab-style Hook Target Picker in AdminHooks 'Create a Hook' card and (2) new Master Admin Credentials card in Settings > Users. All 15 review_request checkpoints PASS on https://lemon-checker.preview.emergentagent.com.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminHooks.jsx is ~655 lines and still mixes create-form, list, edit-dialog, move-dialog into one file — extracting CreateHookCard, MoveDialog, EditDialog would improve maintainability and testability.

AdminUsers.jsx 'New password' field on the master-creds card uses type='text' (not 'password'), so the new password is visible in plain text on screen. Consider type='password' for consistency with the Current-password input (line ~148) and to avoid shoulder-surfing. Same observation applies to the 'Create User' password input and the user-edit dialog.

After a successful owner-credentials update, the response sets a new session token but the displayed username badge in the header still reads the old 'owner' until next page load — acceptable since reload happens on next request, but worth confirming UX flow.

Test left two TEST hooks in DB (campaign-level 'TEST CAMP HOOK <ts> headline' and ad-group level 'TEST AG HOOK <ts> headline' on Camry owners). They are easy to remove via the trash icon in Hook Variants & Performance, but a programmatic cleanup endpoint or 'TEST_' prefix convention would help.
test_credentials: Admin owner: username 'owner' (or blank), password 'LemonPros2026!'. NOTE: this test changed the stored owner password to 'TestPass456'. Env-recovery password 'LemonPros2026!' STILL WORKS (verified at the end of the test).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 hooks via the new picker: (a) campaign-level on 'Toyota Lemon — Search' (Entire campaign), (b) ad-group level on 'Camry owners' (AG_1). Both hooks remain in DB and visible in Hook Variants & Performance.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Seed data verified by main agent: campaign CAMP_A 'Toyota Lemon — Search' with ad-groups AG_1 'Camry owners' and AG_2 'Prius owners' are present and render as pills.

DETAILED RESULTS:
1. /admin login with password 'LemonPros2026!' (username 'owner') -> admin-tab-hooks visible. PASS.
2. Hooks tab: hooks-target-home pill present. PASS.
3. Campaign pill found: hooks-target-campaign-CAMP_A 'Toyota Lemon — Search'. PASS.
4. Clicking Home -> 'Showing on: Home'. PASS.
5. Clicking campaign pill reveals 'Inside Toyota Lemon — Search' row with hooks-target-whole-campaign + two ad-group pills (AG_1 Camry owners, AG_2 Prius owners). PASS.
6. 'Showing on: Campaign: Toyota Lemon — Search' when Entire campaign selected. PASS.
7. 'Showing on: Ad group: Camry owners' when AG_1 selected. PASS.
8. Create hook at CAMPAIGN level (Entire campaign on Toyota Lemon) saved & appears in list. PASS.
9. Create hook at AD-GROUP level (Camry owners) saved & appears in list. PASS.
10. Settings tab + Users sub-tab -> owner-creds-card visible. PASS.
11. Wrong current password -> toast 'Current password is incorrect.' shown twice (sonner stacks), backend returns 401, no change. PASS.
12. Correct change (new pw 'TestPass456' + current 'LemonPros2026!') -> toast 'Master admin credentials updated.' PASS.
13. Logout + login w/ new password 'TestPass456' -> admin loaded. PASS.
14. Logout + login w/ original env-recovery 'LemonPros2026!' -> admin loaded (env recovery confirmed). PASS.
15. No console errors during normal flows (only expected 401 on wrong-pw step).

NOTES FOR MAIN AGENT:
- Owner password is currently 'TestPass456' in DB. If you want to reset back to 'LemonPros2026!' through UI, log in (either pw works), open Settings > Users > Master Admin Credentials, set new password 'LemonPros2026!' and current password 'TestPass456' (or 'LemonPros2026!').
- The two TEST hooks created remain in the list and should be deleted via the trash icon if cleanup is desired.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Both new features (tab-style Hook target picker and Master Admin Credentials card) behave per spec end-to-end including persistence, env-recovery and error paths.
